name: cloudflare-webdav-worker
description: A Cloudflare Workers + R2 WebDAV service with a bilingual admin panel.

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:worker && npm run typecheck:admin
scripts.check: npm run test && npm run typecheck && npm run build:admin && wrangler deploy --dry-run

WEBDAV_BUCKET.description: R2 bucket used to store WebDAV files.

WEBDAV_CONFIG.description: KV namespace used to store app metadata for the admin panel.

ADMIN_TOKEN.description: Bootstrap token used once at `/manage` to set the permanent admin password.
